title: Node.js
description: Server-side JavaScript. Express, file system, streams, modules, npm, REST APIs, and real-time apps.

items.label: Hello World
Modules (CommonJS vs ESM)
FS Operations
NPM Commands
items.code:
npm init -y                    # create package.json
npm install express            # install dependency
npm install -D typescript      # dev dependency
npm install -g nodemon         # global install
npm uninstall lodash           # remove
npm update                     # update all
npm outdated                   # check outdated
npm ls --depth=0               # list top-level deps
npm audit                      # security audit
npm audit fix                  # fix vulnerabilities
npm ci                         # clean install (CI)

# package.json scripts
"scripts": {
  "start": "node server.js",
  "dev": "nodemon server.js",
  "test": "jest",
  "build": "tsc"
}
# npm run dev
